message:
🌱 dex: UserInfo endpoint (#1870)

* 🌱 Add dex: UserInfo endpoint mission

* 🌱 Add dex: UserInfo endpoint mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* Fix dex #376 mission: correct PR to #1473 (UserInfo endpoint)

Replace wrong PR dexidp/dex#766 (implicit/hybrid flow) with the
actual fix dexidp/dex#1473 (Add UserInfo endpoint). Update resolution
text to describe the UserInfo endpoint feature.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,73 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "dex-376-userinfo-endpoint",
+  "missionClass": "fixer",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "dex: UserInfo endpoint",
+    "description": "UserInfo endpoint. Requested by 11+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current dex deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your dex version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n dex -l app.kubernetes.io/name=dex\nhelm list -n dex 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working dex installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review dex configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant dex configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n dex -l app.kubernetes.io/name=dex\nkubectl get configmap -n dex -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=dex\n```\nI am currently trying to get dex working in a ruby environment. On the RP side I am currently working with [omniauth-openid-connect](https://github.com/jjbohn/omniauth-openid-connect), which has some issues of its own."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for UserInfo endpoint",
+        "description": "Dex added a UserInfo endpoint implementation in PR #1473, providing an OIDC-compliant /userinfo endpoint that returns claims about the authenticated user. This enables standard OIDC clients to retrieve user profile information after authentication.\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n dex -l app.kubernetes.io/name=dex\nkubectl get events -n dex --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"UserInfo endpoint\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Dex added a UserInfo endpoint implementation in PR #1473, providing an OIDC-compliant /userinfo endpoint that returns claims about the authenticated user. This enables standard OIDC clients to retrieve user profile information after authentication.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "dex",
+      "sandbox",
+      "security",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "dex"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "sandbox",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/dexidp/dex/issues/376",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/dexidp/dex",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/dexidp/dex/pull/1473"
+    },
+    "reactions": 11,
+    "comments": 26,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with dex installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-04-01T06:49:23.897Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
